h1: 18 kg Dryer | DUAL Inverter Heat Pump™ | LG ThinQ (Wi-Fi) | Black Steel

gallery.a: Front view of LG 18kg DUAL Inverter Heat Pump Dryer in Black Steel (RH18U8JVCW)

modules.head: Dual Saving on Energy & Time
modules.body: Advanced inverter technology with DUAL Inverter Heat Pump™ delivers higher energy efficiency AND shorter drying times than ever before — save on both electricity bills and your day.

imgs.a: Dual Saving on Energy and Time with DUAL Inverter Heat Pump

modules.head: Save Energy or Save Time — Your Choice
modules.body: Eco Hybrid™ technology lets you choose: run the drying cycle for maximum energy savings, or switch to faster drying when you're in a hurry — one dryer, two modes, to match your lifestyle.

imgs.a: Eco Hybrid — save energy or time depending on your needs

modules.head: Smoothen Crease and Reduce Shrinkage
modules.body: Low-temperature Heat Pump drying smoothens creases and reduces shrinkage — keeping delicate fabrics, knitwear and everyday garments looking their best for longer.

imgs.a: Gentle Care — smoother fabrics, less shrinkage

modules.head: 99.9% Live Dust-Mite Reduction
modules.body: The Allergy Care cycle reduces 99.9% of live house dust mites that cause allergy and respiratory issues — tested and certified by the British Allergy Foundation (BAF) for peace of mind.
modules.disc: *Tested by BAF (British Allergy Foundation). Results may vary.

imgs.a: 99.9% Live Dust-Mite Reduction certified by BAF

modules.head: Maintain High Drying Performance
modules.body: Auto Cleaning Condenser ensures proper air flow to maintain peak drying performance cycle after cycle — hassle-free maintenance means more free time for you.

imgs.a: Auto Cleaning Condenser maintains drying performance

modules.head: Optimise Every Dry Cycle
modules.body: Intelligent Sensor Dry detects real-time moisture levels in your load and automatically adjusts drying time — so clothes come out perfectly dry, never over-dried or damp.

imgs.a: Sensor Dry automatically optimises drying time

modules.head: Smart Convenience with LG ThinQ™
modules.body: Operate your dryer remotely, download new drying cycles (Gym Clothes, Blanket Refresh, Lingerie, Minimise Wrinkles), track energy consumption, and access Smart Diagnosis™ — all via Wi-Fi through your smartphone.
modules.disc: *LG ThinQ™ app available on compatible Android and iOS devices. Wi-Fi connection and product registration required.

imgs.a: LG ThinQ Wi-Fi smart dryer control

specs.v: Dial + Touch + Hard Buttons & LED Display
Cotton, Easy Care, Duvet / Bedding Refresh, Down Jacket Refresh, Wool, Activewear / Sportswear, Towels, Quick Dry, Cool Air, Allergy Care
10-Year DUAL Inverter Compressor + 10-Year Inverter Motor Warranty
